title: Technology in the Sea
description: A new take on ocean block with the create mod.
body:
You are stranded on a small cargo ship in the middle of an endless ocean. The steam engines are not working and you don't have the materials to repair them.
Luckily, the ocean has all the resources allowing you to create different kinds of technology.

With Create, harness the power of rotational force to build complex mechanical systems — from waterwheels and conveyor belts to fully automated factories that harvest, process, and assemble for you.

Applied Energistics 2 brings high-tech storage and automation to your ship. Compress your entire storage into digital drives, set up automated crafting systems, and manage resources with precision.

When you're ready to look beyond the ocean, Ad Astra lets you build rockets and explore distant planets, each with their own challenges, environments, and resources waiting to be tapped.

If that is not enough of an adventure, you can explore the Ice Maze of Aquamirae and the Aether. Both offer challenging boss fights as well as of treasures and lore to be uncovered.
